title: equisetum alpinum
intro: Equisetum alpinum, also known as alpine horse tail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is one of the few surviving species of the ancient group known as the horsetails. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary and kidney issues, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. Equisetum alpinum has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be dried and used as a powder in various medicinal and health products.
